name: async-pr-review
tagline: Starts and checks status of a background PR review job that runs preflight checks, Gemini-powered test plans, and code review in an.
verdict: Clear two-branch workflow (start vs. check status) with a defined final-assessment artifact set to read back. But it delegates all real work to unreviewed external scripts, never declares its gemini/git dependency, has no handling for script failure or a non-COMPLETE/IN_PROGRESS status, and doesn't address restarting a review for a PR that's already in.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion anywhere; could misfire against requests for a synchronous/inline PR review.
Only STATUS: IN_PROGRESS / STATUS: COMPLETE are handled; no guidance for script failure, missing gemini/git, or any error status.
Re-running Start Review for a PR whose worktree at .gemini/tmp/async-reviews/pr-<number> already exists is never addressed.
